name: Fake Background Check Fee Scam
description: Scammer posing as a hiring firm demands an upfront background check fee from a freelancer

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: We are a U.S.-based marketing firm. We want to offer you a $5,000/week retainer. We found your Upwork profile.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: That sounds great! What are the requirements?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: You need to purchase a $250 background check through our certified partner at bgcheck-verify-pro.com to complete onboarding.

red_flags: Advance fee disguised as background check
